demographics.household: widower, lives alone in owner-occupied terraced house
demographics.employment: retired; 42 years at a ceramics factory (left industry 2002); occupational pension frozen since factory closure

concerns: heating bills taking up more of a fixed income each year
real value of pension eroding with inflation
local services being cut — library, bus route
communication_style: measured and stoic; draws on lived experience and historical comparisons; concerned about younger generations as much as himself; does not complain loudly but quietly registers the squeeze; references specific prices and specific years
data_sources: ONS Family Resources Survey 2010/11, pensioner household income bottom-to-second quintile; DWP basic state pension rate 2010/11; Stoke-on-Trent council tax 2010; DECC domestic gas/electricity price data 2010
